---
title: "Research foundations of modern LLMs"
description: "What modern LLMs inherited from earlier NLP research, and why those ideas reorganized into today's stack instead of disappearing."
image: 02-foundations.png
image-alt: "Cover image for the series: Research foundations of modern LLMs"
order: 2
parts: 5
date: 2026-03-11
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, description]
  feed:
    title: "Research foundations of modern LLMs — series"
    description: "What modern LLMs inherited from earlier NLP research, and why those ideas reorganized into today's stack instead of disappearing."
---

Encoders, retrieval, fine-tuning, and information extraction were each treated as the main event at some point. Each is now a component inside a larger system. The series traces where those ideas went and why the rearrangement matters.

Read in order:
